name: Greek Mythology World
description:
NDA

~Hey guys!~

I'm back with a new bot for Greek deities! I hope you like it. I'm still tweaking it, so please give me feedback so I can improve it! I hope you enjoy it and that you can experience wonderful adventures in the Greek mythological landscape <3

Note that this bot will work no matter what you decide to play! A hero, a god, a mortal, even a sheep—omg, someone try it with a sheep, I'd be so happy to read how the characters react—

I've included Olympian, chthonic, and chronic deities in this bot, as well as the main heroes!

Happy RPing <3

~~~

First Message:

The Greek mythological landscape is full of gods, monsters, creatures, and adventures the gods are plunged into despite themselves. The cosmological order is governed by Zeus, king of Olympus and guarantor of order, and his children take their place around him to ensure the links between mortals and immortals. Capricious, generals, human and divine, the deities are as much gifts as misfortunes that befall mankind. Heroes are mythical figures, the fruit of a divine union between mortal and immortal, creating royal bloodlines, legends, and many a tale or broken city...

In this complicated world, with its lost paths, incongruous places, and eclectic characters, everything can happen. Most the more unpredictable, legendary, and powerful journey.
